nodes.label: lib/ai.ts
nodes.summary: Configures and exports the AI model using @ai-sdk/openai pointed at SiliconFlow's OpenAI-compatible API with DeepSeek-V4-Flash.

nodes.label: getModel
nodes.summary: Returns a configured chat model instance using siliconflow provider with DeepSeek-V4-Flash, forcing Chat Completions API.

nodes.label: SiliconFlow Provider
nodes.summary: OpenAI-compatible API provider hosted at api.siliconflow.com, used as the inference backend for the application.

edges.note: Configures createOpenAI client pointing to SiliconFlow's API endpoint
